task: Scaffold mkdocs-material site + GitHub Pages CI for the AI Onboarding Site (Phases 2 & 3 of ralplan-friends-onboarding-artifact.md). Content authoring deferred to user.
scope_notes: Phases 2 and 3 ONLY. Note files get H1 + one-line placeholder + <!-- TODO: author --> comment. No body content.

stories.title: Repository foundation (requirements.txt + .gitignore)
acceptanceCriteria: File requirements.txt exists at repo root containing exactly two pinned deps: mkdocs==1.6.* and mkdocs-material==9.5.*
File .gitignore exists at repo root and lists: site/, .venv/, __pycache__/, *.pyc

stories.title: Placeholder content files in docs/
acceptanceCriteria: Files exist: docs/index.md, docs/mental-model.md, docs/practical-patterns.md, docs/limits.md, docs/examples.md, docs/tools.md, docs/404.md
Each file starts with a single H1 heading appropriate to the file purpose
Each file contains the literal HTML comment <!-- TODO: author --> on its own line
No file contains body content beyond H1 + one short placeholder line + the TODO comment
ls docs/*.md | wc -l equals 8 (7 published + 1 _jargon-allowlist.md which is excluded from the build via exclude_docs)

stories.title: Jargon allowlist seed
acceptanceCriteria: File docs/_jargon-allowlist.md exists
File contains a clearly labeled list of seed approved terms drawn from the plan: LLM, prompt, context window, hallucination, chat model, agent, RAG, embedding, fine-tune, token
File explains the gloss-on-first-use rule for any term not on the allowlist

stories.title: mkdocs.yml + theme overrides (noindex + footer)
acceptanceCriteria: File mkdocs.yml exists at repo root

mkdocs.yml sets site_name, site_url (placeholder OK), theme.name=material, theme.custom_dir=overrides, nav listing the 6 content pages in reading order (index, mental-model, practical-patterns, limits, examples, tools), plugins includes search (404.md in docs/ is auto-served by mkdocs-material as 404.html — no config key needed)
mkdocs.yml markdown_extensions contains ONLY toc (with permalink:true). NO admonition, NO pymdownx.*

File overrides/main.html exists, extends base.html, and injects <meta name="robots" content="noindex"> into the head block and a personal-correspondence footer note (e.g. 'Personal correspondence — please don\'t republish.') into the footer block
grep -E 'pymdownx|admonition' mkdocs.yml returns empty

stories.title: README documenting preview + Pages-enablement
acceptanceCriteria: README.md exists at repo root
README explains what the site is in 1-2 sentences
README documents local preview: pip install -r requirements.txt && mkdocs serve
README documents the one-time GitHub Pages enablement step explicitly: Settings → Pages → Source = 'GitHub Actions'
README explains directory layout (docs/ holds content; overrides/ holds theme overrides; .github/workflows/ holds the deploy workflow)

stories.title: GitHub Actions deploy workflow
acceptanceCriteria: File .github/workflows/deploy.yml exists
Workflow triggers on push to main and on workflow_dispatch
Workflow uses actions/checkout, actions/setup-python, actions/configure-pages, actions/upload-pages-artifact, and actions/deploy-pages
Workflow does NOT use 'mkdocs gh-deploy' anywhere
Workflow has permissions: pages: write, id-token: write, contents: read
Workflow has a concurrency group named 'pages' with cancel-in-progress: false
grep -E 'gh-deploy|gh-pages' .github/workflows/deploy.yml returns empty (no legacy branch-based deploy)
grep -E 'actions/(configure-pages|upload-pages-artifact|deploy-pages)' .github/workflows/deploy.yml returns 3 matches

stories.title: Build verification gate
acceptanceCriteria: mkdocs and mkdocs-material installed (verified via 'mkdocs --version' exit 0)
'mkdocs build --strict' exits 0 from the repo root with no warnings
grep -rE '^!!!|^\?\?\?|^===\s' docs/ returns empty (Principle 1 enforcement)
grep -rE '\{%|\{\{' docs/ returns empty (no Jinja templating in content)
The built site/ directory contains index.html, mental-model/index.html, practical-patterns/index.html, limits/index.html, examples/index.html, tools/index.html, 404.html
site/index.html contains the noindex meta tag
site/index.html contains the personal-correspondence footer note
